vector.description: A 3D vector with x, y, and z components.

magnitude.description: Returns the magnitude of the vector.

normalize.description: Normalizes the vector to a unit vector.

vertex.description: A 3D point with x, y, and z components.

transform.description: Transforms the vertex by a matrix.

parameters.name: transformer
parameters.description: The vector to transform the vertex by.

length.description: Returns the length of the vertex from the origin.

copy.description: Creates a copy of the vertex.

parameters.name: toPoint
parameters.description: The vertex to copy the vertex to.

parameters.name: byVector
parameters.description: The vector to copy the vertex by.

sketch.description: A 2D sketch with a list of vertices and edges.

addVertex.description: Adds a vertex to the sketch.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: The vertex to add to the sketch.

addEdge.description: Adds an edge to the sketch.

parameters.name: edge
parameters.description: The edge to add to the sketch.

transform.description: Transforms the sketch by a matrix.

parameters.name: transformer
parameters.description: The vector to transform the sketch by.

copy.description: Creates a copy of the sketch.

parameters.name: byVector
parameters.description: The vector to copy the sketch by.

removeVertex.description: Removes a vertex from the sketch.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: The vertex to remove from the sketch.

removeEdge.description: Removes an edge from the sketch.

parameters.name: edge
parameters.description: The edge to remove from the sketch.

body.description: A 3D body with a list of vertices and edges.

addVertices.description: Add helper vertices to the body.

addEdges.description: Add helper edges to the body.

area.description: Returns the area of the body.

volume.description: Returns the volume of the body.

side.description: A body side (cap or lateral face set).

distanceToPoint.description: Returns the distance from a point to the plane.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to measure the distance to.

distanceToPlane.description: Returns the distance between two planes.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to measure the distance to.

projectPoint.description: Projects a point onto the plane.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to project onto the plane.

distanceToPoint.description: Returns the distance from a point to the axis.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to measure the distance to.

projectPoint.description: Projects a point onto the axis.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to project onto the axis.

length.description: Returns the length of the array.

createVector.description: Creates a 3D vector with the given x, y, and z components.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x component of the vector.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y component of the vector.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z component of the vector.

removeVector.description: Removes a vector by its coordinates.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x component of the vector.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y component of the vector.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z component of the vector.

removeVector.description: Removes a previously defined vector from the scene.

parameters.name: vector
parameters.description: The vector object to be removed. Can be the vector itself or its variable name.

removeVector.description: Removes a vector by its identifier.

parameters.name: vectorId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the vector to be removed.

removeVector.description: Removes a vector by its variable name.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x coordinate of the vector to be removed.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y coordinate of the vector to be removed.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z coordinate of the vector to be removed.

createVertex.description: Defines a point in 3D space using a vector.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x coordinate of the vertex.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y coordinate of the vertex.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z coordinate of the vertex.

removeVertex.description: Removes a vertex by its coordinates.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x coordinate of the vertex.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y coordinate of the vertex.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z coordinate of the vertex.

removeVertex.description: Removes a previously defined vertex from the scene.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: The vertex object to be removed.

removeVertex.description: Removes a vertex by its identifier.

parameters.name: vertexId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the vertex to be removed.

removeVertex.description: Removes a vertex by its variable name.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x coordinate of the vertex to be removed.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y coordinate of the vertex to be removed.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: The z coordinate of the vertex to be removed.

setPlane.description: Defines a plane in 3D space using a point and a normal vector.

parameters.name: equation
parameters.description: The equation of the plane in the form Ax + By + Cz + D. This means a plane with normal vector (A, B, C) that is D units from the origin. Basically, it is defined as Ax + By + Cz + D = 0.

resetPlane.description: Resets the plane to its default state, removing any custom definitions.

addLine.description: Draws a line between two vertices in 3D space.

parameters.name: startVertex
parameters.description: The starting vertex of the line.

parameters.name: endVertex
parameters.description: The ending vertex of the line.

addLine.description: Draws a line between two vertices identified by their IDs.

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: The line reference object or its variable name. The line should exist in the scene.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: A point on the line, specified as a vertex object or its variable name. The point should exist on the line. If the point is on the line but doesn't exist on the scene, it will be created automatically.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in degrees from the line's direction to the desired direction.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the new line segment to be drawn from the specified point.

addPath.description: Draw a path through a list of points.

parameters.name: points
parameters.description: The points to be connected to form the path.

drawArc.description: Draws an arc between two points in 3D space.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The starting point of the arc, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: The ending point of the arc, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius of the arc.

drawArc.description: Draws an arc given a center point, radius, start angle, and end angle.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The center point of the arc, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius of the arc.

parameters.name: startAngle
parameters.description: The starting angle of the arc in degrees.

parameters.name: endAngle
parameters.description: The ending angle of the arc in degrees.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The center point of the circle, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius of the circle.

drawPolygon.description: Draws a polygon defined by a list of vertices in 3D space.

parameters.name: vertices
parameters.description: An array of vertex objects that define the corners of the polygon. The last vertex will be connected to the first to close the polygon.

extrude.description: Extrudes a closed area or side profile to create a 3D body.

parameters.name: area
parameters.description: Closed area or side to extrude (shape/side object, id, or name).

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Extrusion distance.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of extrusion to apply to the area. Can be 'one-sided', 'two-sided', or 'symmetric'.

parameters.name: newBody
parameters.description: Whether to create a new body (currently always creates a new body).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction vector the shape extrudes toward, specified as a vector object/id/name. Uses pure translation (no twist/rotation/scale); only orientation is used (e.g. (100,0,0) == (1,0,0)). Extrusion length is controlled by height. Direction must have a non-zero component along the area normal. Defaults to the area normal when omitted.

extrude.description: Extrudes an existing side (face profile) to create a new body.

parameters.name: sideId
parameters.description: Side object/id/name to extrude.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Extrusion distance.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of extrusion to apply to the area. Can be 'one-sided', 'two-sided', or 'symmetric'.

parameters.name: newBody
parameters.description: Whether to create a new body (currently always creates a new body).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction vector the side profile extrudes toward, specified as a vector object/id/name. Uses pure translation (no twist/rotation/scale); only orientation is used (e.g. (100,0,0) == (1,0,0)). Extrusion length is controlled by height. Direction must have a non-zero component along the profile normal. Defaults to the side normal when omitted.

setBodyMaterial.description: Sets the material of a body by id.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body id to update.

parameters.name: material
parameters.description: Material key (e.g., BODY_WALNUT).

loft.description: Creates a lofted 3D shape by connecting multiple cross-sectional profiles.

parameters.name: areas
parameters.description: An array of 2D areas (closed sketches) to be lofted together, specified as sketch objects or their variable names. Order matters!

lookAt.description: Makes the camera look at a specific point in the scene.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to look at, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to look at, specified as a vector object or its variable name.

pattern.description: Creates a pattern by repeating a body or sketch.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The body id to repeat.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to repeat the body or sketch, specified as a vector object or its variable name.

parameters.name: spacing
parameters.description: The spacing between the repetitions of the body.

parameters.name: repetitions
parameters.description: The number of repetitions to repeat the body.

pattern.description: Creates a pattern by repeating a body or sketch.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The body id to repeat.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to repeat the body or sketch, specified as a vector object or its variable name.

parameters.name: totalDistance
parameters.description: The total distance to repeat the body.

parameters.name: repetitions
parameters.description: The number of repetitions to repeat the body.

pattern.description: Creates a circular pattern around a center. Orbit radius is derived from the source item's current distance to center, and each repeated item rotates with the orbit.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The body id to repeat.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: Center of orbit, specified as a vertex object or its variable name.

parameters.name: repetitions
parameters.description: Number of repeated instances (the source item is the starting reference on the orbit).

modifyVertex.description: Modifies a vertex's position. All dependents (edges, sketches, closed shapes, bodies, pattern instances) update recursively.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: The vertex to modify, by ID (e.g. vertex_3f91abf6) or variable reference.

parameters.name: newVertex
parameters.description: The new position as vertex(x,y,z) or coordinates.

modifyVertex.description: Modifies a vertex's position. All dependents update recursively.

parameters.name: vertexId
parameters.description: The vertex ID to modify.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: New x coordinate.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: New y coordinate.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: New z coordinate.

setUnit.description: Sets the unit of the canvas.

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: The unit to set the canvas to. Can be

makePoints.description: Creates a list of points from a given equation.

parameters.name: xt
parameters.description: The equation to create the points from.

parameters.name: yt
parameters.description: The equation to create the points from.

parameters.name: zt
parameters.description: The equation to create the points from.

parameters.name: t
parameters.description: The constraint on t. Can be '>=', '<=', '>', '<', '==', '!='. User can use 'OR' or 'AND' to combine multiple constraints but use them with parentheses.

parameters.name: numberOfPoints
parameters.description: The number of points to create.

addHelperAxis.description: Adds a visual helper axis through a point along a direction vector.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: Point the helper axis passes through. Accepts vertex object/command result or variable name.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: Axis direction vector. Accepts vector object/command result or variable name.

addHelperAxis.description: Adds a helper axis with explicit length and styling.

parameters.name: vertex
parameters.description: Point the helper axis passes through.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: Axis direction vector.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Total visual length of the helper axis.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Optional RGB hex color (e.g. 0xff0000).

revolve.description: Creates a 3D shape by revolving a 2D shape around an axis.

parameters.name: area
parameters.description: The 2D area to be revolved, specified as a closed sketch or its variable name.

parameters.name: axis
parameters.description: The axis to revolve the area around, specified as a vector object or its variable name.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the revolved body.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Sweep angle in degrees. Positive/negative values are allowed. Default: 360.

union.description: Creates a union of two or more bodies.

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.description: The bodies to union.

intersect.description: Creates an intersection of two or more bodies.

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.description: The bodies to intersect.

parameters.name: keep
parameters.description: Optional. Keep source bodies after intersection. Default is true. Accepts 1/0 or true/false.

subtract.description: Creates a subtraction of two or more bodies.

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.description: The bodies to subtract. The bodies name should have + or - in front of it to indicate the operation.

split.description: Splits a body into multiple bodies.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body to split.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to split the body by.

split.description: Splits sketch into multiple sketchs by a plane.

parameters.name: sketch
parameters.description: The sketch to split.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to split the sketch by.

mirror.description: Mirrors a body across a plane.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The body to mirror.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to mirror the body across.

sweep.description: Sweeps a sketch along a path.

parameters.name: sketch
parameters.description: The sketch to sweep.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path to sweep the sketch along.

setLightDirection.description: Sets the direction of the light.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction of the lsight.

rotate.description: Rotates a body or sketch around an axis.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The body or sketch to rotate.

parameters.name: axis
parameters.description: The axis to rotate the body or sketch around.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle to rotate the body or sketch around the axis.
